description_long: This lamp features a spherical central body mounted on a robust, ornate base with a circular footprint. The upper portion of the sphere is broken or missing, revealing a jagged edge and an open cavity. The surface of the lamp is textured, with visible wear and patina, suggesting it is made of aged metal or stone. The base is decorated with carved details and ridges, giving it a classical, almost antique appearance. The lamp lacks any visible electrical components or bulbs, and the opening at the top may have once held a light source or decorative element. The overall form and craftsmanship indicate it was likely designed as a decorative street or park lamp.
description: A weathered, spherical lamp with a broken top and ornate, circular base, featuring classical decorative details and a textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spherical body, ornate base, and the broken, jagged top opening most clearly.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the curvature of the sphere and the depth of the broken top, with the base partially visible.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizes the open cavity at the top and the lamp's vertical alignment, with the base and sphere in profile.
description_view_3: Rear angled view shows the lamp's rounded form and the extent of the missing upper section, with base details partially obscured.
